creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
Create a new MySQL55-server port which uses the OpenSSL product instead
of the yassl product for SSL support. Contrary to some opinions, OpenSSL
is not deprecated. This new port would be named appropriately (such as
"mysql55-server-openssl"). This will then provide a continuing mysql series
that uses the wildely popular and well known OpenSSL product.

Fix: 

Refer to previously submitted patch requests for mysql55-server relating to OpenSSL.
